text: Thinking up new ideas and being creative is important to her/him. She/He likes to do things in her/his own original way.
It is important to her/him to be rich. She/He wants to have a lot of money and expensive things.
She/He thinks it is important that every person in the world be treated equally. She/He believes everyone should have equal opportunities in life.
It is important to her/him to show her/his abilities. She/He wants people to admire what she/he does.
It is important to her/him to live in secure surroundings. She/He avoids anything that might endanger her/his safety.
She/He likes surprises and is always looking for new things to do. She/He thinks it is important to do lots of different things in life.
She/He believes that people should do what they're told. She/He thinks people should follow rules at all times, even when no-one is watching.
It is important to her/him to listen to people who are different from her/him. Even when she/he disagrees with them, she/he still wants to understand them.
It is important to her/him to be humble and modest. She/He tries not to draw attention to herself/himself.
Having a good time is important to her/him. She/He likes to 'spoil' herself/herself.
It is important to her/him to make her/his own decisions about what she/he does. She/He likes to be free and not depend on others.
It is very important to her/him to help the people around her/him. She/He wants to care for their well-being.
Being very successful is important to her/him. She/He hopes people will recognize her/his achievements.
It is important to her/him that the government ensures her/his safety against all threats. She/He wants the state to be strong so it can defend its citizens.
She/He looks for adventures and likes to take risks. She/He wants to have an exciting life.
It is important to her/him always to behave properly. She/He wants to avoid doing anything people would say is wrong.
It is important to her/him to be in charge and tell others what to do. She/He wants people to do what she/he says.
It is important to her/him to be loyal to her/his friends. She/He wants to devote herself/herself to people close to her/him.
She/He strongly believes that people should care for nature. Looking after the environment is important to her/him.
Tradition is important to her/him. She/He tries to follow the customs handed down by her/his religion or her/his family.
She/He seeks every chance she/he can to have fun. It is important to her/him to do things that give her/him pleasure.
It is important to her/him to make her/his own decisions about what she/he does. She/He likes to be free to plan and to choose her/his activities for herself/herself.
It is important to her/him to accept the portions of life that are given to her/him. She/He believes people should be satisfied with what they have.
She/He wants everyone to be treated justly, even people she/he doesn't know. It is important to her/him to protect the weak in society.
It is important to her/him to be dependable and trustworthy. She/He wants to be a reliable person that others can count on.
She/He seeks every opportunity she/he can to have fun. Having a good time is very important to her/him.
It is important to her/him to be wealthy. She/He wants to have a lot of money and expensive things.
She/He thinks it is important that every person in the world should be treated equally. She/He believes everyone should have equal opportunities in life.
It is important to her/him to get respect from others. She/He wants people to do what she/he says.
It is important to her/him to be loyal to her/his friends. She/He wants to devote herself/herself to people close to her/him.
She/He really wants to enjoy life. Having a good time is very important to her/him.
It is important to her/him to be humble and modest. She/He tries not to draw attention to herself/herself.
She/He always wants to be the one who makes the decisions. She/He likes to be the leader.
It is important to her/him to adapt to nature and to fit into it. She/He believes that people should not change nature.
She/He thinks it's important not to ask for more than what you have. She/He believes that people should be satisfied with what they have.
She/He seeks every chance she/he can to have fun. It is important to her/him to do things that give her/him pleasure.
It is important to her/him to make her/his own decisions about what she/he does. She/He likes to be free and not depend on others.
It is very important to her/him to help the people dear to her/him. She/He wants to care for their well-being.

It is important to her/him that the government insures her/his safety against all threats. She/He wants the state to be strong so it can defend its citizens.

It is important to her/him to understand different kinds of people. She/He wants to learn about people who are different from her/him.
She/He believes all the worlds' people should live in harmony. Promoting peace among all groups in the world is important to her/him.
She/He thinks it is important to be interested in things. She/He likes to be curious and to try to understand all sorts of things.
She/He thinks it is important to be a dependable and faithful friend. She/He tries hard to be someone that others can count on.
Being very successful is important to her/him. She/He hopes people will recognize her/his achievements.
It is important to her/him that the government ensures her/his safety against all threats. She/He wants the state to be strong so it can defend its citizens.
She/He looks for adventures and likes to take risks. She/He wants to have an exciting life.
Religious belief is important to her/him. She/He tries hard to do what her/his religion requires.
It is important to her/him that people do what she/he says they should. She/He wants people to follow rules at all times, even when no-one is watching.
She/He thinks it is important that every person in the world be treated equally. She/He wants justice for everybody, even for people she/he doesn't know.
